item.title: School Car Gets Priority
item.description: Safety comes first when a school car is involved. How does Ron Pratt ensure this recovery gets top priority?

media:content.media:title: School Car Gets Priority
media:content.media:description: Safety comes first when a school car is involved. How does Ron Pratt ensure this recovery gets top priority?

item.title: Dump and Run Fun
item.description: A dump truck mishap turns into a recovery challenge. What makes this job both tricky and entertaining?

media:content.media:description: A dump truck mishap turns into a recovery challenge. What makes this job both tricky and entertaining?

item.title: Windy Conditions Lead to a Recovery
item.description: Strong winds create chaos on the road. How does Ron Pratt manage a recovery in these unpredictable conditions?

media:content.media:title: Windy Conditions Lead to a Recovery
media:content.media:description: Strong winds create chaos on the road. How does Ron Pratt manage a recovery in these unpredictable conditions?

item.title: Be Careful on the Side of the Highway
item.description: Highway recoveries are dangerous. This clip shows why caution is critical when working roadside. What’s your top safety tip for highway jobs?

media:content.media:title: Be Careful on the Side of the Highway
media:content.media:description: Highway recoveries are dangerous. This clip shows why caution is critical when working roadside. What’s your top safety tip for highway jobs?

item.title: Helping Out a Prime Truck
item.description: A Prime truck in trouble gets expert help. What recovery steps turn this tough situation around?

media:content.media:description: A Prime truck in trouble gets expert help. What recovery steps turn this tough situation around?

item.title: Ron Pratt Rescues a Batwing from the Muck
item.description: Ron Pratt tackles a batwing stuck deep in the muck — a messy but satisfying recovery. What’s the dirtiest recovery you’ve ever done?

media:content.media:title: Ron Pratt Rescues a Batwing from the Muck
media:content.media:description: Ron Pratt tackles a batwing stuck deep in the muck — a messy but satisfying recovery. What’s the dirtiest recovery you’ve ever done?

item.title: Moving a Heavy Load
item.description: When the job demands strength and precision, Ron Pratt steps in. How does he handle this massive recovery?

media:content.media:title: Moving a Heavy Load
media:content.media:description: When the job demands strength and precision, Ron Pratt steps in. How does he handle this massive recovery?

item.title: Recovering a Loaded, Overturned Box Van
item.description: Heavy, loaded, and overturned — this box van recovery is no small task. What’s the hardest loaded recovery you’ve seen?

media:content.media:title: Recovering a Loaded, Overturned Box Van

item.title: When the Job Goes Sideways, Literally!
item.description: Recovery doesn’t always go as planned — sometimes the job tilts in unexpected ways. What’s your most memorable “sideways” moment?
